action.reasoning: Observation: The previous training achieved an EER of 8.15%, but I discovered a critical broadcasting bug in `train.py` where `criterion(logits, labels)` was computing a [B, B] loss matrix because `logits` was [B, 1] and `labels` was [B]. Analysis: Fixing this bug should massively improve training efficiency and model performance. Additionally, I will upgrade the model architecture by replacing mean pooling with Attentive Statistics Pooling (ASP), which is standard for speaker/spoofing tasks. I will also add channel simulation augmentations (lowpass/highpass filters) to better prepare the model for the unseen codecs in the test set. Decision: Update `model.py` with ASP, `dataset.py` with filter augmentations, and `train.py` to fix the loss bug. Train for 15 epochs and submit evaluation.
